name: a11y-agent-ops-monorepo
description: Monorepo for a11y-agent-ops (CLI, engine, shared, web)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared && npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine && npm run build -w a11y-agent-ops
scripts.build:netlify: npm run ensure:linux-natives && npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared && npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine && npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/web
scripts.build:all: npm run build:netlify && npm run build -w a11y-agent-ops
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared && npm run build -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine && netlify dev --filter @a11y-agent-ops/web --offline
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine && npm run typecheck -w a11y-agent-ops && npm run typecheck -w @a11y-agent-ops/web
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared && npm run clean -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine && npm run clean -w a11y-agent-ops
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine -w a11y-agent-ops --no-git-tag-version && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine -w a11y-agent-ops --no-git-tag-version && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: npm version major -w @a11y-agent-ops/shared -w @a11y-agent-ops/engine -w a11y-agent-ops --no-git-tag-version && npm version major --no-git-tag-version
